    Class AnimationChannel

    An animation channel combines an animation sampler with a target property being animated.

    Inheritance

    public sealed class AnimationChannel : ExtraProperties, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<Animation>

    Properties

    Name Description
    LogicalIndex

    Gets the zero-based index of this Animation at

    LogicalParent

    Gets the Animation instance that owns this object.
    TargetNode

    Gets the Node which property is to be bound with this animation.
    TargetNodePath

    Gets which property of the Node pointed by TargetNode is to be bound with this animation.
